title: Gravel Simulation
description: Variable terrain, sustained effort with power spikes
purpose: Variable terrain, sustained effort with power spikes

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2: where champions are made when no one's watching. 75%, 85-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 72 minutes remaining. Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training fat oxidation.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 72 minutes to go. Easy does it. 75% FTP. Build your engine.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/13. You're 20% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/13. 110% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/13. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/13. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/13. You've accumulated 8min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 5:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 68% for 5:00. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 5:00 at 68%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 23% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 23% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 26 minutes of threshold work done. Block 1/1. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 16min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 85-95 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your body knows what to do at threshold. Trust your fitness. Block 1/1.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/1. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 26 minutes in. You're in the zone. Keep breathing rhythmic. Block 1/1.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 33% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-95 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 33% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace. 8:00 at 75%.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 33% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 42% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Current: 110% FTP × 3:00. After rest, expect 68% for 5min. Plan accordingly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 42% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 42% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 42% done. 110% for 3:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 45% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 5:00 at 68%. Conversational pace — should be able to talk in full sentences.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 45% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 45% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 45% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 51% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 40 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 46 minutes in. 95% at 85-95 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 51% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 5 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 51% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 51% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 95%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 55% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 50 minutes of Z2 work. 85-95 rpm, Seated. Smooth, relaxed pedaling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 55% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 55% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 55% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Deep into it now. 58 minutes of work behind you. Finish what you started.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 64% complete. 110% for 3:00. Fatigue is real — maintain 90-105 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 58 minutes of work done. 29 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Deep into it. Your lungs will remember this moment. So will your neighbors from the screaming.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 64% into session. 110% at 90-105 rpm. Stay sharp on technique.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 61 minutes in. Your friends are posting VO2max intervals. You're being smart.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 24 minutes remaining. Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training fat oxidation.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 24 minutes to go. Consistency over intensity. You're doing the work that matters.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 24 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 67% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 73% through. 95% at 85-95 rpm. Your legs are burning. Perfect. That's lactate threshold working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 73% through session. Block 1/1. You've done 56min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 1 blocks to go. 20 minutes. This discomfort is temporary. The fitness is permanent.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 73% done. 1 blocks left. Only. ONLY. *laughs maniacally*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 73% into session. Seated at 85-95 rpm. Stay controlled — smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 77% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance zone: 65-65% FTP. Fat oxidation, mitochondrial biogenesis, capillary density.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 65% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 65% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 70 minutes of Z2. Easy effort. This is recovery in disguise.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 88% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 70min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 88% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 88% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
